series_metadata.series_description: This form, INV0102, is used by Ohio Investigative Unit personnel to request that a citation case be referred to the Citation Review Board before being forwarded to the Attorney General's Office.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Attach case in OASIS and permanently. ; Paper: Scan into Ohio Agent Secure Information System (OASIS) and attach case. paper copy can be destroyed upon successful completion of scanned record into OASIS
